title: rubus pubescens microgene evagatus
intro: Rubus pubescens microgene evagatus, also known as the dwarf raspberry or dwarf thimbleberry, is a type of plant in the Rubus genus, characterized by its small size and thimble-shaped fruit. The medicinal properties of this plant include its use in treating digestive issues, inflammation, and as an astringent. The health benefits of Rubus pubescens microgene evagatus include its ability to aid in weight loss, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant properties. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
